subcodes.first_line: O thou who art great! All praise be unto God that thou hast repeatedly been favoured with the fragrance of the traces of the Most Exalted Pen. How sweet was that fragrance when it wafted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا بزرگ الحمد لله بعرف آثار قلم اعلی مکرر فائز شدی حبذا ذاک الشذا حین هبت این
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @living waters; water of life, @love as fire, @Moses, @spiritual transformation
